title: Shop Settings
save_pending_currency: Confirm (check button) or cancel the currency you are adding before saving.

shop_info.title: Shop Information
shop_info.no_route: Do not use route path. (For standalone shop operation)

business_info.title: Business Information
business_info.postcode_plugin_required: Daum Postcode plugin is not installed or inactive. Please activate it in Admin > Plugins.

inquiry_settings.title: 1:1 Inquiry Board Settings
inquiry_settings.module_not_installed: Available after activating the Board module.

language_settings.title: Base Currency
language_settings.description: Configure the base currency for the shop. Site language is managed in General settings.
language_settings.currency_change_warning: Cannot be changed once a product or order has been registered.

exchange_settings.title: Exchange Rate Settings
exchange_settings.description: Configure exchange rates per the base currency's base unit and rounding rules per currency.
exchange_settings.base_unit_hint: The unit used as the basis for exchange rate input when this currency is the base currency. (e.g. KRW = 1,000 / USD = 1)
exchange_settings.locales_hint: When a member signs up, if their browser language matches this currency's languages, this currency becomes their default payment currency.
exchange_settings.duplicate_currency_error: This currency code is already registered.

default_pg_provider.title: Default PG Provider
default_pg_provider.description: Select the default PG provider for payment processing.
default_pg_provider.not_installed: Install a PG plugin to select a provider.

payment_methods.title: Payment Methods
payment_methods.description: Configure available payment methods and set priorities.
payment_methods.mileage_deduction_timing_disabled_hint: Mileage usage is disabled, so the deduction timing does not apply.

bank_accounts.title: Bank Account Settings
bank_accounts.description: Manage bank account information for bank transfers.

cancellable_statuses.title: Cancellable Statuses
cancellable_statuses.description: Configure which order statuses allow cancellation by users and administrators.
cancellable_statuses.label: Cancellable Order Statuses
cancellable_statuses.hint: Only orders in selected statuses can be cancelled. Default statuses (Pending Order, Pending Payment, Payment Complete) are always cancellable.

confirmable_statuses.title: Confirmable Statuses
confirmable_statuses.description: Configure which order option statuses allow purchase confirmation by users.
confirmable_statuses.label: Confirmable Order Statuses
confirmable_statuses.hint: Only order options in selected statuses can be confirmed.

auto_cancel.title: Auto Cancel Orders
auto_cancel.description: Configure auto-cancellation and payment due dates for pending orders.
auto_cancel.toggle_description: Automatically cancel pending payment orders after the specified period.
auto_cancel.toggle_hint: When disabled, pending payment orders will not be auto-cancelled.
auto_cancel.days_prefix: Pending payment orders will be auto-cancelled

cart_expiry.title: Cart Expiry
cart_expiry.description: Configure auto-deletion period for cart items.
cart_expiry.prefix: Cart items will be auto-deleted after

stock_management.title: Stock Management
stock_management.restore_on_cancel_description: Automatically restore deducted stock when an order is cancelled.
stock_management.restore_on_cancel_hint: Also applies to returns and exchanges.

refund_reasons.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this refund reason?

basic.title: Basic Shipping Settings
basic.description: Manage default shipping country and international shipping settings.
basic.default_country_hint: Default country added when creating a new shipping policy

countries.title: Available Countries
countries.duplicate_error: This country code is already registered.

types.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this shipping type?

form.code_placeholder: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens (e.g., cj, fedex)
form.name: Carrier Name
form.tracking_url_help: {tracking_number} will be replaced with the tracking number.

carriers.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this carrier?

remote_area.title: Remote Area Shipping Fee Defaults
remote_area.description: Configure default shipping fees for remote areas.

disable_international.title: Confirm Disable International Shipping
disable_international.message: Disabling international shipping will deactivate all countries except the default country. Do you want to continue?

meta_settings.title: Meta Tag Settings
meta_settings.description: Configure meta tags for each page. You can use variables for dynamic settings.

seo_friendly.title: SEO-Friendly Page Settings
seo_friendly.description: Provide optimized pages for search engines.
seo_friendly.clear_cache_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all SEO cache? Cache will be regenerated on next bot visit.
seo_friendly.clear_cache_success: SEO cache has been cleared successfully.
seo_friendly.user_agent_description: Manage User-Agents to provide SEO-friendly pages.

review_settings.title: Review Settings
review_settings.write_deadline_days_hint: Days after purchase confirmation to write a review
review_settings.max_images_hint: Max images per review (0 = no images allowed)
review_settings.max_image_size_mb_hint: Maximum file size for uploaded images

notification_definitions.title: Notification Settings
notification_definitions.description: Manage ecommerce notification templates by channel.
notification_definitions.toggle_success: Notification active status has been changed.
notification_definitions.reset_success: Notification has been reset to default.

reset_modal.title: Reset to Default
reset_modal.confirm_message: All channel templates of this notification will be restored to defaults.
reset_modal.warning_message: The saved subject, body, and recipient settings will be permanently lost.

identity.intro: Manage policies declared by the ecommerce module and policies added by operators. You can enable domain-specific policies such as identity verification before checkout.
identity.purposes_section_title: Identity Purposes Registered by This Module
identity.purposes_section_description: Purposes declared by the e-commerce module. Selectable in the policy "Purpose" column.
identity.purposes_empty: No identity purposes registered by this module.
